scripts.mobile:build: bun run build && bun run cap:sync
scripts.mobile:ios: bun run mobile:build && bun run cap:ios
scripts.mobile:android: bun run mobile:build && bun run cap:android
scripts.lint: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched apps/mobile/package.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.typecheck.json apps/mobile/next.config.ts
scripts.lint:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched apps/mobile/package.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.typecheck.json apps/mobile/next.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched apps/mobile/package.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.typecheck.json apps/mobile/next.config.ts
scripts.format: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --write --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true apps/mobile/package.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.typecheck.json apps/mobile/next.config.ts
scripts.format:check: cd ../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true apps/mobile/package.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.json apps/mobile/tsconfig.typecheck.json apps/mobile/next.config.ts
